content: This app is amazing and helps me manage my kids allowance perfectly!
Crash detection didn't work when I dropped my phone. Very concerning.
The app freezes every time I try to link my plaid account.
Wish there was a dark mode! Otherwise great app.
Cannot login to my account! It keeps saying network error.
Scam! Charged me twice for the premium subscription.
Location tracking is spot on. Gives me great peace of mind.
SOS button emergency alert failed during our test today.
UI is a bit slow and laggy on older devices.
